name: IS - The Suspect (2022) (GB)
plot:
Doctor Joseph O'Loughlin a man who appears to have the perfect life and a successful career as a clinical psychologist.

But nothing can be taken for granted, even the most flawless existence is only a loose thread away from unravelling.
cast: Aidan Turner, Shaun Parkes, Imogen Daines, Camilla Beeput, Anjli Mohindra, Tara Lee, Bobby Schofield, Tom McKay

name: IS - Cell 8 (2022) (SE)
plot: Follows detectives Mariana Hermansson and Ewert Grens, as they get into a mysterious and increasingly dark series of events.
cast: Mimosa Willamo, Katie Brayben, Richard Lintern, Victor McGuire, Will Thorp, Leon Herbert, Freddie Wise, Leonard Terfelt

name: IS - Fenris (2022) (NO)
plot: When Emma hears that her father has stopped doing his job as a wolf researcher, she takes her son Leo to Østbygda to find out what's going on. At the same time, a young boy disappears without a trace from the village.
cast: Ida Elise Broch, Cengiz Al, Julia Schacht, Ane Ulimoen Øverli, Jan Gunnar Røise, Jonas Strand Gravli, Ingjerd Egeberg, Magnus Krepper

name: IS - Last Light (2022) (US)
plot: Separated across continents, petro-chemist Andy Yeats and his family must survive the deadly effects of a sudden global oil crisis and find the mastermind behind it all.
cast: Matthew Fox, Joanne Froggatt, Alyth Ross, Taylor Fay, Amber Rose Revah

name: IS - Below (2022) (NO)
plot: A young woman whose life is turned upside down by a traffic accident that kills her best friend and leaves her paralyzed from the waist down.
cast: Maria Austgulen, Mari Hauge Einbu, Isabel Bråthen, Janne Kokkin

name: IS - Boys (2022) (DK)
plot: A Danish group of guys sing in a church choir on Sunday, but indulge in God's forbidden pleasures every other day. When one of them drowns under mysterious circumstances, their unity and loyalty to one another is put to the ultimate test.
cast: Sylvester Byder, Viktor Hjelmsø, Dar Salim, Karoline Hamm, Julie Christiansen, Zoe Bryan Hertz, Nicklas Søderberg Lundstrøm

name: IS - Harmonica (2022) (SE)
plot: Sixteen years ago, Harry and Monica lived a glamorous life as the band Harmonica. Now their marriage sings its last verse, but when they are offered to go on tour, Monica gives Harry an ultimatum: tour or divorce.
cast: Jonas Karlsson, Josephine Bornebusch, Eric Ericson, Nina Zanjani, Jörgen Thorsson, Lisette Pagler, Hakan Vreskala, Gregg Chilingirian

name: IS - Ida Takes Charge (2022) (NO)
plot: Ida has just arrived in Oslo to study psychology at the University, after dropping out of her literature studies in Trondheim. Ida's is anxious for most things. Not getting of the bus at the right stop, running out of toilet paper on the public toilet, environmental changes and world war three. But her greatest fear is terror. There is nothing that frightens her more than being a victim of a random attack.
cast: Elli Rhiannon Müller Osborne, Arthur Hakalahti, Mohammed Aden Ali, Gaute Berg Næss, Sofia Tjelta, Keisha Rudbakken, Julie Grønning Rognmo, Clara Mølsted-Ylönen

name: IS - Furia (2021) (NO)
plot: Policeman Asgeir moves to an idyllic town in the west part of Norway. After a local conflict, he meets a mysterious woman named Ragna, and soon they are both trapped in a network of right-wing radical forces that threaten Europe.
cast: Pål Sverre Hagen, Ine Marie Wilmann, Borys Szyc, Henrik Schyffert

name: IS - Kin (2021) (IE)
plot: The lives of a Dublin family embroiled in a gangland war and the consequences of their choices.
cast: Charlie Cox, Aidan Gillen, Clare Dunne, Maria Doyle Kennedy, Emmett Scanlan, Sam Keeley, Yasmin Seky, Francis Magee

name: IS - Sort Of (2021) (CA)
plot: Fluid millennial Sabi Mehboob straddles various identities from bartender at an LGBTQ bookstore/bar, to the youngest child in a Pakistani family, to the de facto parent of a downtown hipster family. Sabi feels like they’re in transition in every aspect of their life, from gender to love to sexuality to family to career.
cast: Bilal Baig, Kaya Kanashiro, Aden Bedard, Gray Powell, Amanda Cordner, Ellora Patnaik, Grace Lynn Kung, Supinder Wraich

name: IS - Two Sisters (2021) (SE)
plot: Sisters Alicia and Vanessa are best friends, but they begin to distance themselves in search of their identity in the adult world. Based on the triology of Amanda Schulman and Hannah Widell.
cast: Julia Ragnarsson, Dilan Gwyn, Hannes Fohlin, David Larsson, Helmon Solomon, Pablo Leiva Wenger

name: IS - Stella Blómkvist (2017) (IS)
plot: Stella is a young, cute, libertine, tough, confident, intelligent, cunning Icelandic lawyer with a flexible moral compass who takes on mysterious and often dangerous cases and only loves rules when she's breaking them.
cast: Heida Reed, Sara Dögg Ásgeirsdóttir, Kristín Þóra Haraldsdóttir, Jóhannes Haukur Jóhannesson, Þorsteinn Guðmundsson

name: IS - Swedish Dicks (2016) (SE)
plot: Two unlicensed Swedish private investigators try to make a living in Los Angeles.
cast: Peter Stormare, Johan Glans, Vivian Bang, Felisha Cooper, Stephanie Koenig
director: Andrew Lowery, Peter Settman, Glenn Lund

name: IS - Justified (2010) (US)
plot: A character drama based on the 2001 Elmore Leonard short story "Fire in the Hole." Leonard's tale centers around U.S. Marshal Raylan Givens of Kentucky, a quiet but strong-willed official of the law. The tale covers his high-stakes job, as well as his strained relationships with his ex-wife and father.
cast: Timothy Olyphant, Walton Goggins, Nick Searcy, Jere Burns, Joelle Carter, Jacob Pitts, Erica Tazel

name: IS - Wallander (2008) (GB)
plot: This drama follows Inspector Kurt Wallander – a middle-aged everyman – as he struggles against a rising tide of violence in the apparently sleepy backwaters in and around Ystad in Skane, southern Sweden. Based on the international best-selling books by Henning Mankell.
cast: Kenneth Branagh, Sarah Smart, Richard McCabe, Tom Hiddleston, David Warner, Sadie Shimmin, Jeany Spark, Tom Beard

name: IS - Agatha Christie's Marple (2004) (GB)
plot: The adventures of Miss Jane Marple, an elderly spinster living in the quiet little village of St Mary Mead. During her many visits to friends and relatives in other villages, Miss Marple often stumbles upon mysterious murders which she helps solve. Although the police are sometimes reluctant to accept Miss Marple's help, her reputation and unparalleled powers of observation eventually win them over.
cast: Julia McKenzie

name: IS - Hammarvik (2020) (SE)
plot: When police officer Johanna Strand returns to her hometown Hammarvik to attend her mother's funeral, she expects to stay only for a few nights but the body of a young woman is found and she decides to stay and investigate what happened.
cast: Disa Östrand, Linda Santiago, Martin Stenmarck, Christopher Wollter

name: IS - Box 21 (2020) (SE)
plot: Romanian Lidia is lured to Sweden, where she is locked up and prostituted. In her search for revenge, her fate is intertwined with the police officer Ewert Gren, who chases a dangerous criminal.
cast: Mimosa Willamo, Leonard Terfelt, Bahador Foladi, Kristofer Kamiyasu, Simon J. Berger, Cristian Bota, Edda Magnason, Sandra Andreis

name: IS -Under the Radar: Secrets of a Swedish Serial Killer (2024) (SE)
plot: A documentary filmmaker comes across the song lyrics "Under the Radar," written by serial killer Peter Mangs during his time in prison. In the lyrics, Mangs has left clues to two unsolved murders in Florida.
cast: Jim Rathmann, John Mork, Tom Myers

name: IS - Manayek (2020) (IL)
plot: Izzy Bachar, a police internal affairs investigator, discovers just before retirement that his long time friend Barak, a senior police officer, is accused to be corrupt. Life as he knows it breaks into pieces.
cast: Shalom Assayag, Amos Tamam, Liraz Chamami, Sasi Samucha, Mouna Hawa, Doron Ben-David, Haim Zanati, Yair Raufman

name: IS - Partisan (2020) (SE)
plot: A man gets a new job in the idyllic surroundings of Jordnära, a gated community that runs a successful organic farm. But he quickly realizes that their rules and routines are somewhat unorthodox.
cast: Anna Björk, Sofia Karemyr, Ylvali Rurling, Emelie Jonsson, Pelle Holmström, Nanna Blondell, Aaron Staton, Vala Norén

name: IS - Professionals (2020) (US)
plot: After their advanced medical satellite explodes on deployment, billionaire futurist Peter Swann, and his fiancée, medical visionary Dr. Graciela "Grace" Davila, turn to a hardened former counterintelligence officer.
cast: Tom Welling, Elena Anaya, Brendan Fraser, Ken Duken, Lisa Loven Kongsli, Stevel Marc, Tanya van Graan, Nic Rasenti

name: IS - The Machinery (2020) (NO)
plot: Olle Hulten wakes up drunk on the ferry between Sandefjord and Strömstad. In his car is a gun and a lot of money. Simultaneously the police is chasing a robber whom have hijacked a car and is holding the security guard at gunpoint.
cast: Kristoffer Joner, Julia Schacht, Hanna Alström, Emilia Roosmann, Anastasios Soulis, Maja Svärd
director: Richard Holm, Niclas Ekström, Kjersti Ugelstad

name: IS - First Responders (2020) (SE)
plot: First Responders is from Sweden’s SF Studios and follows the daily lives of hospital, police and rescue personnel in the beautiful but hazardous Swedish mountains and will debut on Viaplay in the Nordics in 2020.
cast: Karin Bengtsson, Tiril Eeg-Henriksen, Göran Gillinger, Nadja Halid, Mårten Svedberg, Henrik Lundström, Isa Aouifia

name: IS - Occupied (2015) (NO)
plot: In the near future, Norway is occupied by Russia on behalf of the European Union, due to the fact that the newly elected environmental friendly Norwegian government has stopped the all important oil- and gas-production in the North Sea.
cast: Henrik Mestad, Eldar Skar, Ingeborga Dapkūnaitė, Selome Emnetu
director: Erik Skjoldbjærg, Jo Nesbø, Karianne Lund

name: IS - Shadowplay (2020) (DE)
plot: In 1946 Berlin, an American cop searches for his missing brother while helping a novice German policewoman fight the violent crimes engulfing the city.
cast: Taylor Kitsch, Michael C. Hall, Nina Hoss, Sebastian Koch, Tuppence Middleton, Logan Marshall-Green, Mala Emde, Anne Ratte-Polle

name: IS - Call Me Dad (2024) (DK)
plot: Timid Emil and self-confident Viktor are lifelong friends and partners in a sustainable catering company. When Viktor begins dating Helle, Emil's mother, a highly unusual family face-off begins. Family relations, friendships, and partnerships are put to the ultimate test as Emil struggles to come to terms with his new "dad."
cast: Alex Høgh Andersen, Magnus Haugaard, Ellen Hillingsø, Roberta Reichhardt, Johanne Milland

name: IS - The Tudors (2007) (US)
plot: The Tudors is a history-based drama series following the young, vibrant King Henry VIII, a competitive and lustful monarch who navigates the intrigues of the English court and the human heart with equal vigor and justifiable suspicion.
cast: Jonathan Rhys Meyers, Henry Cavill, Sarah Bolger, Max Brown, David O'Hara, Lothaire Bluteau, Tamzin Merchant, Torrance Coombs

name: IS - Younger (2015) (US)
plot: Liza Miller, a suddenly single stay-at-home mother, tries to get back into the working world, only to find it’s nearly impossible to start at the bottom at 40-year old. When a chance encounter convinces her she looks younger than she is, Liza tries to pass herself off as 26 and lands a job as an assistant at Empirical Press. Now she just has to make sure no one finds out the secret only she and her best friend Maggie share.
cast: Sutton Foster, Hilary Duff, Debi Mazar, Nico Tortorella, Molly Bernard, Peter Hermann

name: IS - Honour (2019) (SE)
plot: Four partners at a law firm called "Heder" gain notoriety by helping victims of sex crimes and speaking out against patriarchy.
cast: Anja Lundqvist, Julia Dufvenius, Alexandra Rapaport, Eva Röse, Jakob Eklund, Karin Bjurström, Ellen Bökman, Björn Kjellman
director: Anja Lundqvist, Sofia Helin, Julia Dufvenius

name: IS - Maria Wern (2008) (SE)
plot: Crime Inspector Maria Wern returns to duty at the Police Department on the island of Gotland, and is immediately thrown into a murder investigation.
cast: Eva Röse, Oscar Pettersson, Peter Perski, Erik Johansson, Matilda Wännström, Allan Svensson

name: IS - Witch Hunt (2020) (NO)
plot: Ida Waage is a dynamic woman, working as the CFO at a prestigious law firm. One day, she spots a suspicious invoice and soon traces it back to a money laundering operation linked to the firm’s biggest client, Peer Eggen. She alerts her executive board, but to her shock, they turn on her, and look to discredit her with the threat of false accusations. With her job and credibility at threat, Ida continues to seek justice and alerts the police.
cast: Ingrid Bolsø Berdal, Gard B. Eidsvold, Mads Ousdal, Sara Khorami, Preben Hodneland, Ola G. Furuseth, Christian Skolmen

name: IS - The Ambassador (2020) (SE)
plot: At the Swedish embassy in Mexico City, the staff tries to do everything to promote the image of Sweden. But for the selfish ambassador Thomas Hofwander, it is mainly about lifting himself.
cast: Mikael Tornving, Happy Jankell, Fredrik Hallgren, Anna Gunnarsson, Elisabeth Wernesjö, Emil Almén, Maria Selbing

name: IS - Cryptid (2020) (SE)
plot: As a chain of horrific and inexplicable events start to unfold in their small town on the northern hemisphere, an ensemble of high school students will be forced to face their darkest fears in order to overcome a supernatural force feeding on chaos and the misery of mankind.
cast: Maja Johanna Englander, Julius Fleischanderl, Astrid Morberg, Beata Borelius, Angelina Håkansson, Deniece Ignacio Nyman, Johan Hedenberg, Christian Sundgren
